name: Rosemary Cordial 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Taste is supposed to be delicate and somewhat like Drambuie (according to the author).
2. Add the bruised rosemary leaves to the Scotch and shake well.
3. Let it stand overnight only.
4. Strain with cheesecloth.
5. Add the honey and shake well.
6. Let stand 2-3 weeks so that the pollen and other tiny particles in the honey settle out.
7. Siphon off the clear portion, which will be all but the last 1/2 inch or so of the bottle.
